_comment: Cloak: up to 16 reference colors. Texels close to ANY get recolored. Avoid: up to 16 colors (skin, metal, etc.) — texels close to ANY get the recolor mask reduced so they stay vanilla.
_comment_avoidRadius: Optional; if omitted, defaults to matchRadius. Same 0.02–1.0 range as matchRadius.
_comment_mapIcon: When true, logs SSMP compass/map-icon broadcast, server late-join replay, and deferred remote icon creation (set without enabling debugLogging to avoid cloak scanner noise).
_comment2: Scene-wide scanner. A sprite is considered Hornet if (a) its texture instance was already seen on a hero renderer (registry), or (b) its texture name contains one of sceneScanTextureContains, or (c) its full GameObject path contains one of sceneScanPathContains. Path matching catches scene-specific poses (resting in bed, sitting at things) whose atlas the active hero never renders directly. Set debugLogging=true to see which sprites get matched/ignored and on which path.
_comment_registryDeny: When (a) alone would match, paths containing any of these substrings are skipped — shared atlas0 IDs also appear on VFX/HUD/sprite-cache tk2d sprites.
_comment_heroMesh: CloakRecolor re-scans the player hierarchy for MeshRenderers every N frames (material tint still applies every LateUpdate). 1 = full scan every frame.
_comment3: Diagnostic: when true, the first time we see each Hornet atlas we dump it as a PNG to BepInEx/plugins/HornetCloakColor/TextureDumps/ so you can correlate runtime InstanceIDs with actual sprite sheets. Off by default; turn on when you need to identify a texture, then turn off again.
_comment_perf: When true, logs aggregated [HCC/Perf] lines every ~2s: CloakRecolor LateUpdate cost (scales with player count in MP), CloakSceneScanner FindObjects+loop, and SyncRemoteMapIconsVisible call rate. Turn off after profiling.
